reviews.review_description: Another one of the nebulous 'future experiences' that is just music videos, but not the good VR ones, like just normal ones on a stage, and you're like 'there', but. no. The music is lame too, but that's subjective.
this is a great vr concert experience. musicans need to get into this!! $$
360 music videos have been done for a while, this is nothing special for 5GB. I feel like music experiences can be so much more now. this felt rushed and simplified
Loved this experience and would probably never have listened to Bastille normally but this makes me want to keep listening, more bands should do this!
I loved this great Bastille mini album through VR. It wss a bit like one of the okd Pink Floyd concerts, really hope to see more of these! Muse and Imagine Dragons next, please!

One word: WOW! 
More words: What an absolutely brilliant experience. Each song and corresponding environment/effects really encapsulate the Give Me The Future and Future Inc. narrative and I can’t wait for more VR content from Bastille. Even my 68 year old mother loved diving into VR with Give Me The Future. (How about a Bastille song pack add-on for Beat Saber? *hint hint*)

This is such an amazing experience. I just wanted to check it out, but now I just love going back again and again. Pull your trigger buttons while enjoying the experience, it's a pretty cool effect. Distort the light beam has become one of my new favorite songs. 🥰
Omg this was freaking awesome I mean 10 out of 10!!!!!!!
Really cool experience for free. Loved the music and the visuals, can’t wait to see them live again!
